description.ko: 유리를 통과하는 빛이 굴절의 원리를 통해 선명한 무지개 스펙트럼으로 갈라지는 매혹적인 탐구.
description.en: A mesmerizing exploration of light passing through glass, splitting into a vibrant spectrum of colors through the physics of refraction.

prompt: A hyper-realistic macro shot of a triangular crystal prism sitting on a dark reflective surface. A single beam of pure white light enters from the left, refracting inside the glass and emerging as a vivid, spreading rainbow spectrum. Cinematic lighting, 8k resolution, ethereal bokeh background, sharp focus on the chromatic dispersion.
